Darren Oliver

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Left

6-3, 250lb (190cm, 113kg)

Born: October 6, 1970 in Kansas City, MO us

Draft: Drafted by the Texas Rangers in the 3rd round of the 1988 MLB June Amateur Draft from Rio Linda HS (Rio Linda, CA).

High School: Rio Linda HS (Rio Linda, CA)

Debut: September 1, 1993 (Age 22-330d, 16,394th in major league history)
   vs. BOS 0.0 IP, 0 H, 0 SO, 1 BB, 0 ER

Last Game: September 29, 2013 (Age 42-358d)
   vs. TBR 1.0 IP, 0 H, 2 SO, 0 BB, 0 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1994 season

Agents: Jeff Frye, Mike McCann • Previously: Jay Franklin, Scott Boras

Full Name: Darren Christopher Oliver

View Player Info from the B-R Bullpen

View Player Bio from the SABR BioProject

Relatives: Son of Bob Oliver

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Darren Oliver?

Darren Oliver is 55 years old.

When was Darren Oliver born?

Darren Oliver was born on October 6, 1970.

Where was Darren Oliver born?

Darren Oliver was born in Kansas City, MO.

How tall is Darren Oliver?

Darren Oliver is 6-3 (190 cm) tall.

How much did Darren Oliver weigh when playing?

Darren Oliver weighed 250 lbs (113 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Darren Oliver play?

Darren Oliver played 20 seasons.

Is Darren Oliver in the Hall of Fame?

Darren Oliver has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

When was Darren Oliver drafted?

Darren Oliver was drafted by the Texas Rangers in the 3rd round of the 1988 MLB June Amateur Draft from Rio Linda HS (Rio Linda, CA).

What position did Darren Oliver play?

Darren Oliver was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Darren Oliver have?

Darren Oliver had 1,259 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Darren Oliver played for?

Darren Oliver played for 9 teams; the Los Angeles Angels of Anaheim, Boston Red Sox, Colorado Rockies, Florida Marlins, Houston Astros, New York Mets, St. Louis Cardinals, Texas Rangers and Toronto Blue Jays.

When did Darren Oliver retire?

Darren Oliver last played in 2013.
